item.title: Cirigliano. History, stories, people
item.description: This book is a tribute to Cirigliano, its history, and its community. From the patient and passionate research of Giuseppe Urgo, taken up and completed by his son Dino and his grandson Marcello, an itinerary through the memory of a village takes shape: its places, families, traditions, administrative events, documents, and images that tell its story over time. In an age when small towns face gradual depopulation and collective memory risks fading, these pages set out to preserve and pass on a heritage of history, identity, and belonging.

item.title: Cirigliano. History, stories, people (english edition)
item.description: This book is a tribute to Cirigliano, its history, and its community. From the patient and passionate research of Giuseppe Urgo, taken up and completed by his son Dino and his grandson Marcello, an itinerary through the memory of a village takes shape: its places, families, traditions, administrative events, documents, and images that tell its story over time. In an age when small towns face gradual depopulation and collective memory risks fading, these pages set out to preserve and pass on a heritage of history, identity, and belonging.

item.title: Contact
item.description: For editorial information, submissions, and press requests: centaureaedizioni@gmail.com

item.title: Cookie policy
item.description: This page describes the use of cookies and similar technologies on www.centaurea.it. Technical storage The website may use technical tools needed for operation and browsing security. These tools do not require consent, but they are described in this notice. Analytics preference When you choose whether to accept or reject Google Analytics, the website stores the preference in your browser with the local key centaureaAnalyticsConsent. This storage is used only to remember your choice and is considered technical.

item.title: Example Author
item.description: A short author biography. Replace this text with a real profile.

item.title: Manifesto
item.description: Centaurea was born as an independent publishing project: essential in form, precise in selection, and recognizable in voice.

item.title: Notebooks
item.description: A series devoted to short texts, essays, critical notes, and hybrid forms.

item.title: Privacy
item.description: This notice explains how Centaurea processes personal data collected through www.centaurea.it. Data controller The data controller is Centaurea. For privacy requests, write to centaureaedizioni@gmail.com. Data we process The website is static and does not provide user accounts, registration, or restricted areas. We may process: technical browsing data needed to operate and protect the website; data you voluntarily send by writing to the email address listed on the website; analytics data collected through Google Analytics only if you consent to analytics cookies.
